title: CAX-Agent: A Lightweight Agent Harness for Reliable APDL Automation
summary: CAX-Agent: A Lightweight Agent Harness for Reliable APDL Automation
whyItMatters: Large language models deployed for MAPDL finite-element simulation face practical reliability challenges: without structured execution control, tool encapsulation, and fault recovery, outputs may be inconsistent and task failures are common. The Agent Harness paradigm addresses this by inserting domain-specific orchestration middleware that manages tool lif…
